programme.title: Rekayasa Cinta Dokter Cantik No Play Play

programme.title: Perawat Cinta Cantiknya Gak Ada Obat
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) has just been in a single-car accident that resulted in a broken leg. An ambulance arrives to help him, along with a nurse named Luna (Larasati Nugroho). At the hospital, Dimas's mother wants Luna to care for him until he recovers.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 12
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 61
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Walau Bukan Jodoh Udah Sambungin Aja
programme.desc: Tari gets news that her boss's son is working in her office. Tari thinks her boss's son is Langit, not Gala because it's impossible for her boss to ask his son to work as an office boy. However, several incidents make Tari close to Gala because Gala is so attentive to Tari.

programme.title: Rekayasa Cinta Dokter Cantik No Play Play
programme.desc: Angel (Zoe Abbas), who is constantly pressured by her mother to marry, finally takes the practical route by claiming to be the lover of her patient who suffers from amnesia. Angel's two friends disagree with Angel's idea, but ultimately they support her. Angel says she will soon marry a man whose real name is Marcel (Bryan McKenzie) because Angel claims to be Marcel's fiancée before Marcel's amnesia.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 61
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 12
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 48
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: MARNI, PRIMADONA KAMPUNGAN
programme.desc: Focusing on the life of Marni, a character who has captured the attention of the villagers.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 197
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Aura Duar Jadian yang Tertukar
programme.desc: Fadi (Aditya Zoni), the campus rebel, and Naura (Hafiza Devi), the campus sweetheart, are always at each other's throats. During a scuffle, they accidentally knock over a mystical statue that emits a strange light. The next morning, they wake up to a nightmare: they have swapped bodies and must live each other's lives.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 651
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 1
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 147

programme.title: Badal

programme.desc: Five friends accidentally kill a blind man. Soon, his ghost begins haunting them, turning their lives into a terrifying spiral of guilt, fear, and supernatural revenge they cannot escape.

programme.desc: Chandu and Mallik team up to form a gang that quickly earns a reputation. But as egos clash and trust fades, tension builds, leading to betrayal and the gang's downfall. Release Year: 2002 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Kya Meri Sonam Gupta Bewafa Hai
programme.desc: Sintoo, a dejected lover, pens down his feelings on a currency note which goes viral and triggers a chain of hilarious events. Will he overcome the heartbreak and find closure?

programme.title: Raja Raja Chora
programme.desc: Bhaskar, a timid thief and Xerox worker, risks everything through an affair and a daring final heist, only to be trapped in chaos that flips his life upside down.

programme.desc: The trials and tribulations a couple has to undergo due to the dynamics between their respective mothers.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Koi Jaane Na
programme.desc: Ashwini, an honest policeman, refuses to trade a captured gangster for his son Vijay's release after a ruthless gangster kidnaps him. Vijay grows up resenting his father and turns to a life of crime.

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan

programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.desc: Hosted by an all-star cast, It's Showtime is a variety show unlike any other. Watch as people from all over come on stage to showcase their skills and creativity in this one-of-a-kind talent show full of fun and prizes.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 4
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 6
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Meurtres En Perigord Vert
programme.desc: In Perigord, Isabelle Maurin, recently crowned Queen of Araucania, is found decapitated in the garden of the chateau she has just inherited. This is not the first murder linked to this family. Emma Lambert, a young police lieutenant from Bordeaux, conducts the investigation with Sacha Besson, a lieutenant of the local gendarmerie.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 8
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Hotel Du Cap Eden Roc, Un Paradis Sur Terre
programme.desc: At the tip of Cap d'Antibes, perched on the rocks, stands one of the world's most sought-after palaces and one of the most luxurious on the French Riviera. For 150 years, the prestigious Eden Roc has attracted actors, artists and politicians in search of privacy. Stunning views, magnificent park: a guided tour.

programme.title: a L'ombre Du Pouvoir, Le Cinema De Costa-Gavras
programme.desc: 1965. Costa-Gavras, a young immigrant fleeing Greece, is shooting his first film, ''The Sleeping Car Murder''. In the cast: Yves Montand and Simone Signoret. How will this man, who started from nothing, revolutionize French political cinema?

programme.title: echappees Belles - EP 25
programme.desc: Luxembourg, a little-known, authentic and inspiring country. At the heart of this rediscovery lie majestic forests, secret valleys, picturesque villages and a vibrant culture driven by an engaged, innovative population proud of its roots. Not to mention the discreet but central role of the Grand Ducal family.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 16
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 3
programme.desc: Danielle Mitterrand was hurt when the existence of Mazarine, Mitterrand's secret daughter, and her mother Anne Pingeot were made official. She left, fed up with her husband's secrets. At the highest level of government, emotions were running high. The President was once again faced with a crisis that was threatening his public image.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 4
programme.desc: His illness was worrying and weakening Francois Mitterrand just when he had to travel to Strasbourg for the French presidency of the European Union. He nevertheless found the strength to follow through on the path he had set for himself: to pass on his message to future generations and to reconcile his two families.

programme.desc: Young artistes, each from a universe that's as rich as it is diverse, talk about themselves, their careers, their music, their influences...

programme.title: Ma Vie, Ma Gueule
programme.desc: « I am 55 years old and I still don't know what my nature is. » Barberie Bichette, known as Barbie, is going through an existential crisis and piles up often comical misadventures. An intimate portrait of a woman in three acts, a comedy, a tragedy, an epiphany.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Les Noyaux Sans Cerises
programme.desc: Convinced that the jury of the Red Carpet Film Festival is corrupt, a director decides to rig the audience award vote with his producer, who has been ruined by the making of the film.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 5
programme.desc: Governor Sylvestre has been kidnapped by members of the FLA. A disappearance that has everyone worried. Caro Majeau presents the new ''bechrel'' to Hamelin and his team. Karine is furious, whilst the population is still suffering regular power cuts.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 6
programme.desc: Jessika Walsh reads the FLA manifesto live on national television. The whole population is aghast to learn of the kidnapping of Governor Sylvestre. Hamelin stands firm: he triggers the law that puts the country on a war footing!

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 7
programme.desc: Rivard has a meeting in his office with the members of the FLA. On the internet, a video showing Karine slapping Hamelin goes viral, just as the French president is visiting Quebec. Tension mounts between Hamelin and the latter...

programme.title: Movie - Kushi

programme.desc: A group of villagers are lured to work on a tea plantation run by British officers. Little do they know that there is no chance of homecoming.

programme.title: Movie - Vetrivel Shakthivel

programme.title: Movie - En Mana Vaanil
programme.desc: Ganesh, who is born mute, falls in love with the affluent Thilaka, who is deaf and mute. When they elope, Thilaka's fiance pursues them and tries to split the duo. Will Ganesh and Thilaka ever unite?

programme.title: Movie - Poove Poochooda Vaa
programme.desc: Fate sends a young girl to live with Poongavanthamma, an old woman. The girl, Sundari, introduces herself as the woman's granddaughter. Poongavanthamma initially does not accept her, but eventually grows fond of her.

programme.title: Movie - Pooveli
programme.desc: The views and opinions of four people on love and romance change as time passes by, while they struggle to hold on to their theories.

programme.title: Movie - Iruttu
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mystery behind unnatural deaths after taking charge of his new post at a hill station.

programme.title: Movie - Sathurangam
programme.desc: Journalist Thirupati blows the lid from the sad conditions prevailing inside prisons. A corrupt jailer and a minister are sacked as a result. Shortly, his girlfriend is kidnapped by an unknown person.

programme.title: Movie - Kadavulukku Ore Kaditham

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Fm
programme.desc: A radio jockey has a fan in the form of a girl who often sends song requests. Both fall in love talking over the phone. When it is time to meet face to face, the boy develops an inferiority complex.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE (Live)
programme.desc: A pivotal day in the Premier League at both ends of the table as Man City aim to their the title race to the final day as they face Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium. Coverage then turns to the second half at Stamford Bridge as Spurs hope to pick up another vital win as they face Chelsea.

programme.desc: Andros Townsend reflects on a career shaped by both extraordinary highs and deeply personal challenges. Filmed in Thailand, where he has rediscovered his love for the game, Townsend looks back on a footballing journey that took him through some of England's biggest clubs, while navigating the pressures, setbacks and defining moments that tested him on and off the pitch.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2024/2025 (LIV)
programme.desc: Relive another extraordinary Premier League campaign as Liverpool soared to an historic 20th league title, Nottingham Forest defied expectations and the promoted sides were strenuously challenged. There were also tactical transformations, shifts in narrative trends, and a more open field than ever before. Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 51
programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football's greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City's Premier League title-winning season. Through exclusive interviews with the key figures who lived it, we relive the unity, belief, and impossible run that stunned the football world in 2015-16.

programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football's greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City's Premier League title-winning season. programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2015/2016 (LEI)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 1
programme.desc: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 40
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 51
programme.desc: Ten years on from one of football's greatest sporting shocks, we revisit the extraordinary story of Leicester City's Premier League title-winning season. Through exclusive interviews with the key figures who lived it, we relive the unity, belief, and impossible run that stunned the football world in 2015-16.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 41
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. This week, the Brighton striker sits down with former teammate Owen Hargreaves to reflect on his remarkable journey. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2018/2019 season.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2018/2019 (MNC)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 20
programme.desc: Danny Murphy’s first season with Fulham proved to be one to remember. The Cottagers’ 2007/08 campaign saw them go from doomed to defiant in a matter of matches, rescued at the very last moment, with Murphy playing a pivotal role.

programme.title: FS MMA Cezariusz Kesik vs. Damian Janikowski
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 84 in Gdynia, Poland where Damian Janikoswki takes on Cezariusz Kesik in a 3 round duel!

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jermain Taylor vs. Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-0, 17 KOs) making the 5th defense of his WBC and WBO Middleweight Titles, this time against upstart Kelly 'The Ghost' Pavlik (31-0, 28 KOs) on September 29, 2007 at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Javier Fortuna vs. Derrick Wilson
programme.desc: This episode features undefeated 20-year-old Dominican prospect Javier "El Abejon" Fortuna vs Derrick Wilson for the vacant WBC Youth World featherweight title, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Lamont Peterson facing Amir Khan in a light welterweight title bout that ends in a controversial decision due to a point deduction. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 4 features Kotoeko, Mitakeumi, Hakuho and Takanosho.

programme.title: Introducing:
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents 'Introducing:', a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode brings you behind the scenes at the UFC Fan Expo with current UFC roster members Wanderlei Silva, Frank Mir and Donald "Cowboy" Cerrone. Two of the top corner men in the sport breakdown an MMA fight before our eyes. MMA:30 interviews the most popular ring girl in the game today, Arianny Celeste as she talks about her own MMA training exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Berto vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undeafeated Andre Berto (25-0, 19 KOs) in his 4th defense of the WBC Welterweight Title as he takes on former WBO Champion Carlos 'El Indio' Quintana (27-2, 21 KOs) at the BankAtlantic Center in Sunrise, Florida, USA on April 10, 2010.

programme.title: Return to the Ring Rocky Gannon vs. Dominick Carter
programme.desc: Delivering the untold stories behind some of the most exciting fights in the sport, FIGHT SPORTS brings you 'Return to the Ring'. In this original documentary series, we sit with the participants from some of boxing's most interesting bouts, including the fighters, trainers, officials and promoters that contributed to each event.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams (I)
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the first encounter between Sergio Martinez and Paul Williams. The bout is closely contested throughout and was pegged as a Fight of the Year candidate for 2009.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, St. Petersburg hosts the season finale where we'll see the best Judo from some of the sport's biggest superstars. Plus, we speak with Academy Award winning actor Adrian Brody and get his impressions of attending his first big Judo event, and we follow 3 Georgian warriors who came to St.

programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: WCCB Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 107
programme.desc: Big straws appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po wonder what to do with them. The Teletubbies blow through the straws to make colourful bubbles.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S5) - EP 1
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rain' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about rain!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 43
programme.desc: After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to show him a good time.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: All aboard the Dad Train! Bingo goes from home to daycare to her job at the vet every morning, but there's trouble on the line as a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Andy heads to America and embarks on an epic adventure with a tiny grasshopper mouse.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 2

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 39
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 37
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 49
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Tensions run high within team Voltron as they discuss Lotor’s fate and try to figure out their next move

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 16

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Laura Carrot opens a pet-sitting service but the animals escape/Granny Asparagus convinces Laura Carrot to be the new crime-fighter, Night Pony

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Motato lures a veggie-dinosaur to wreak havoc on the house/Bob's paintings are forgotten when everyone sees Laura Carrot's finger paintings

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 7

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first "tuskist" appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better - now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a suitcase and a hotel brochure, it’s time to take a trip to The Dollhouse Hotel! For our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When the townsfolk decorate the Harmony Harbor holiday tree but lose the treetop star, TZG secretly search for it in the yard of a notoriously scary house. / When it transpires the house is not-so-scary after all and belongs to shy inventor Dr. Greenlittle, TZG secretly leads her to the big Harmony Harbor sing-along so that she doesn't have to spend the holiday alone.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When Athena thinks Lola no longer wants to have their weekly tea party, a tradition they’ve had as long as Athena can remember, Athena tries everything she can to get Lola to have another one. / When Tracy and Harper accidentally leave Wilford at home, on their way to the Fairhaven Pet Get Together, it’s up to the Dew Drops to get him to the park on time. But because it just rained, getting Wilford there clean proves to be a challenge.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 33

A series of lasagna-themed games will challenge their speed, fix-it skills, and leadership. But there can only be one winner.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: When Tag finds out that Pawston has a chance to host the Dogcathalon Race, she and Scooch rush around to create a movie to show why their city should host. Unfortunately everything seems to go wrong. Will Tag and Scooch be able to save their movie before time runs out? / When Tag's construction project accidentally damages Frank and Beans’ house, she invites them to stay with her family during repairs. Tag does her best to keep Frank and Beans busy so they don’t get in the Barkers’ way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 10

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25

For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 25

programme.title: Great Australian Walks S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Gina Chick strides down Bathers Way in Newcastle on a stunning coastal walk that reflects how this harbour city, home to shipwrecks and Silverchair, has reinvented itself.

programme.title: Australian Story (2026) - EP 13
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Gardening Australia S37 - EP 13
programme.desc: Costa visits a lush historic garden, Sophie joins volunteers rescuing fruit from waste, Jerry shares his begonia expertise, Millie creates a mini crevice garden, and we meet an ecologist restoring Tasmania's Midlands.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The battle for bog roll during the Covid 19 years showed us just how much we Aussies value the stuff. In this episode Dr Karl lifts the lid to discover how recycled toilet paper is made at the Encore toilet paper factory.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 78
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 100
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 100
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 100
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 100
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 13
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Four Corners (2026) - EP 14
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Sharon's identical twin vanished. Now, a young woman enters Sharon's life, claiming to be her sister's daughter and bringing with her a revelation that will upend Sharon's whole life.

programme.title: Love At First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 4
programme.desc: To fight desertification, the Earth-Cleaning Bros start planting trees, but finding water and the right spot in endless sand is no easy task. Finally, they begin digging with high spirits.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 7
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 34
programme.desc: Remaining contestants tackle a Mystery Box challenge set by Nagi Maehashi. While the mega Mystery Box features the most ingredients ever, the cooks have just 30 minutes to pull off a winning dish.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they're baked to perfection.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start afresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast. They're searching for the perfect home to embrace a coastal lifestyle.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 15
programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sauteed in oil.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy drive to San Antonio to check out a foreclosure that a friend scored at auction. The house is a time capsule from the 1970s, complete with dirty shag carpet and a faulty HVAC system.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 57
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a new, fun and summery take on a beloved American dish, the tater tot casserole. Her sister Maria rounds out the meal with a homemade, seasonal berry cobbler.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Theresa is a nervous wreck trying to figure out what to pack for her first visit to the UK. Before departing she sages Victoria's house and brings a pre-housewarming gift to encourage her to move out.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: By day Emma is a good Amish girl, but by night she sneaks out with her friend and together they lead a double life. When she witnesses a murder while out, her life and community are thrown into peril.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1) - EP 10

programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. "The Dean" David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.desc: This high-quality educational program, hosted by Tokiwa Takako, is designed for middle-aged and senior viewers with more free time, exploring ways to enjoy a fulfilling adult life through various topics, including food, health, and lifestyle.

programme.desc: Cooking instructors will show all there is to know for a good hearty cooking.

programme.desc: The program introduces various Tanka created by viewers while learning and having fun with engaging guests.

programme.title: German in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 37 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 101
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "Radio Star" Ep. 30 (R)
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there’s no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there’s no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1652
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 42
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 499
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1967
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 83
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Hit the Headlines

"Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 30
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 2
programme.desc: On life's journey, everyone writes their own chapter. "Life's a Journey" takes a close look at real people, showcasing their choices and struggles between family, career, and ideals. Host Zhou Yiwei guides viewers to appreciate not just scenery, but diverse life stories.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2810
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Don't You Know Life is a Journey?
programme.desc: Uncover the unique life stories of people from mainland China, Japan and other Asian regions, getting a closer look at their attitudes, choices, family, career, ideals and values.

programme.title: Sword and Fairy 1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Adapted from game Chinese Paladin, the story follows Li Xiaoyao, a waiter with hero dreams, and Zhao Ling'er, a descendant of Nuwa. They face challenges in search of the Spirit Pearl, courageously embarking on a journey to save the world.

programme.title: Big City Shop 2026
programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies
programme.desc: This show brings on doctors and Chinese medicine practitioners to discuss diseases that the elderly should pay attention to, and provide prevention and treatment methods.

programme.title: When Science Meets Magic
programme.desc: Magic offers a wondrous experience beyond understanding, but could it simply be a scientific phenomenon? Louis Yan, along with Crystal Fung and Eileen Ho, put on captivating performances, with "star students" carefully analysing them, choosing between magic and science!

programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Good Morning Hong Kong and Global View

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Tak-kiu asks someone to gain understanding of the Chiu Ting-kwok murder case. Kam-wing’s safe astonishing contains Chiu Ting-Kwok’s staff card! Tak-kiu approaches Kam-wing and asks him something. The duo unhappily goes their separate ways. Kam-wing is arrested by the police on suspicion of murdering Chiu Ting-kwok, and he takes the blame for everything.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 23
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan abruptly faints, and Yat-yin adheres to medical ethics and performs first aid on her. Yi-ka tries to ask Tak-kiu for help, but Tak-kiu is not in Hong Kong and cannot be contacted. Yat-yin resorts to asking Ngai Hau-tong for help. Hau-tong buys the site, and the matter seems to be concluded.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 35
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2215
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 3
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 887
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 29
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 30
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 19
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 21
programme.desc: Moon-yuet is frustrated as she cannot deal with Wai-wan. Kei-tsun, who has been missing for some time, also turns up. Moon-yuet is determined to get even at all costs. Shing Fung agrees to help. Kei-tsun hooks up with Tang Pui-man, who is the younger sister of a gangster called Tang Wai-nam, as he wants to facilitate a business collaboration between Wai-wan and Wai-nam.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 888
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2215
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 20
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 24
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong Yan, Kai-shum and their chums team up to raise funds, causing Zodiac HK Hospital share price to plummet abnormally. They then launch a hostile takeover. Lau-suet and Kai-ching are persuaded to sell their Zodiac shares, but they both simply refuse. Kai-shum’s funds are withheld by Wing-sing because Wing-sing does not want Yui-fai to be implicated due to market manipulation.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 36
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2216
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Treasures Around - EP 4
programme.desc: The quirky and clever Shan Dandan (Xu Lu), who dreams of becoming a jade appraiser, crosses paths with Pei Pei (Bi Wen Jun), the wayward heir to a jade business. Initially at odds, the two develop a love-hate relationship as they face challenges together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 888
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 19
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 10
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 2
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 5
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 14
programme.desc: FOU (CHOI SIU FUN, ADA) is a beauty living in the time of the Three Kingdoms. A legendary military strategist, CAO CAO (LAU DAN), treats her family well because of her. Everyone is stunned by her beauty, including CAO’s sons, PEI (CHAN HO), who is a powerful warrior and will do anything for FOU; and ZHI (MA CHUN WAI, STEVEN), who is intelligent and a good lover. FOU likes them both at first, but she finds out that PEI is a mean person and decides to love ZHI.

programme.title: Where The Legend Begins - EP 15
